title: BiBi Doll Rag Doll 35cm - Cuddly & Soft Toy, Embroidered Features, Lightweight, Assorted - 1st Birthday, Imaginative Role Play, Girls & Boys, Toddlers & Babies, 10 Months+
features: YOUR CHILD'S FIRST BEST FRIEND: Meet their new favourite cuddly toy. This 12" ragdoll is soft and light, a perfect companion for babies 10 months+. Designed to be a comforting presence from baby to toddlerhood.

SAFE CUDDLES AND CUTE DESIGN: Features sweet embroidered facial details, long yarn hair, and a matching hat. Made from skin friendly, durable fabrics, our plush rag dolls for girls and boys are completely safe for delicate skin. A durable soft doll built for endless hugs.

INSPIRE IMAGINATIVE ROLE PLAY: This soft doll encourages creative fun for your child. It helps toddlers and kids learn important nurturing skills and empathy. A lovely companion for imaginative scenarios, tea parties, and bedtime stories.

THE PERFECT 1ST BIRTHDAY GIFT: Delight your child with this charming rag doll, an ideal 1st birthday gifts for girls and boys, Christmas, or any special occasion. This cuddly toy is a thoughtful present for both girls and boys, sure to become a beloved first friend.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 13 cm, Depth: 6 cm, Height: 35 cm / Weight: 170 g / Package Dimensions: Height: 40 cm, Width: 23 cm, Depth: 7 cm / Package Weight: 170 g / Material: Polyester / Color: Assorted / Recommended Age: 10 months and over / Comes in assorted designs (dispatched randomly)
